utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Here we go . Mona umm , I think it is time we ... we had a conversation about ... about where things are with us .

utterances.speaker: Mona
utterances.text: Yeah , I ... I think I suggested that .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Aw , we ... we are so ... So umm , well I ... I ... I like you and I ... I love umm , you know hanging out with you .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I ... I ... I like you and I ... I love umm , you know hanging out with you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And I mean ... I am having a lot of fun .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I ... I ... I like you and I ... I love umm , you know hanging out with you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , there is no point in spending time with someone if ... if it is just fun .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is gotta be , it is gotta be going somewhere right ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So where ... where is it going ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is ... that is the real question .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And ... and the answer is ... is it is going somewhere ... fun .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Now I ... I know what you are thinking , fun was fine for you like ten years ago you know , but you are ... you are not getting any younger .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No I mean ... No not you , not you , you ... you are getting younger .

utterances.speaker: Mona
utterances.text: I am sorry , so umm , so where are we ?
